description: Letter from Natan b. Avraham, probably in Damietta, to Natanel b. Ravah, in Fustat. In Hebrew. Dating: Probably Spring 1038 CE. Natan is on his way to Palestine; his next stop will be Tinnīs. He refers to economic and family crises. He underwent bloodletting on Friday and received visitors in the home of his host Ḥusayn b. ʿAllān instead of going to synagogue on Shabbat. On verso there is an unrelated liturgical text (added at a later date). (Information in part from CUDL.) ASE
tags: Illness, 11th c, illness letter 969-1517, Illness: bloodletting
description_he: מכתב מנתן בן אברהם, כנראה מדמיאט, לנתנאל בן רבה, פוסטאט, בעברית, כנראה אביב 1038: נתן בדרכו לפלסטינה; עצרת הבאה בתניס. בוצע הקזת דם ביום שישי. על הגב: טקסט ליטורגי שנוסף מאוחר.
